name: Dr. Ankush Jindal
title: BDS · MDS (Prosthodontics) · FICOI
bio: With over 13 years of experience, Dr. Ankush Jindal excels in Dental Implants, Full Mouth Rehabilitation, Smile Designing, Cosmetic Dentistry, and Preventive Dentistry. He believes prevention is better than cure and keeps the clinic equipped with the latest dental technology.
